name: Ginger Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the first five ingredients in a bowl until boiling, stirring constantly.
2. Allow mixture to cool to lukewarm.
3. In another bowl, sift together baking soda and flour.
4. Gradually add the milk and eggs to the sifting mixture, beating thoroughly after each addition.
5. Pour batter into greased muffin pans.
6. Bake in a 350 degree F (175 degree C) oven for 15 minutes.
7. Makes 16 cupcakes.
